to charge the higher prices of the

You can not join the Laundry
Workers union unless you agree to
maintain the scale Of prices for work
done. Our constitution provides for
just prices and we will not allow a
violation of the constitution said
Secretary Hotter, who was backed up
by three other members of the union.


Il want to come into your union.
But I will not agree to charge the
association prices. l will not allow
the union to say what prices / shall
charge for the work." said Manager
Ladely. This is just a move of the
association 1aundries to use the union
to drive out the c. O. D., because it
is an Independent laundry and won't
charge trust prices, or join the trust"


mo, it isn't" insisted Secretary
Hotter.


II say it is. won't allow my
drivers to join If you try to force
them to charge trust prices. We are
making a profit on the lower prices
and won't join the trust. I'll have
my drivers join the Transfers union
and I'll get your union boycotted in
the trades council"


Then it's going to be fight. The
union will fight you to the end


"Why I'll organize another union
here and buck the trust with it. You
I'll take it up with the trades coun-
Gil"


With these defiances the meeting
broke up and the war started.
